name: Broccoli Cheese Dog Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 hot dogs, sliced or 1 cup cooked ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Make deep slits in a crisscross pattern on the flat side of each potato (do not cut into skins).
3. Brush potatoes with margarine.
4. Place potatoes, cut side up, in an ungreased 13x9-inch baking dish.
5. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until tender.
6. Cook broccoli according to package directions and set aside, keeping warm.
7. In a saucepan, combine water and cream sauce mix; blend well.
8. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring frequently.
9. Add hot dogs and cheese; cook until hot dogs are thoroughly heated and cheese is melted.
10. Arrange broccoli on top of potatoes.
11. Top with the hot dog and cheese mixture.
12. For an alternative method using a microwave:
- Pierce whole potatoes with a fork.
- Place on a microwave-safe roasting rack.
- Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes, then turn potatoes and continue microwaving for an additional 5 to 7 minutes or until tender.
- Set aside.
- Microwave broccoli according to package directions.
- In a microwave-safe bowl, combine water and sauce mix; blend well.
- Microwave on HIGH for 3 to 4 minutes or until the mixture boils and thickens (stir once halfway through cooking).
- Stir in hot dogs and cook for 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
- Stir in cheese until melted.
12. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise and mash slightly with a fork before serving.
